type OrderStatus =
  | Pending
  | Paid
  | Shipped
  | Delivered
  | Cancelled

fn next(status: OrderStatus, event: String) -> OrderStatus
  if event == "cancel"
    Cancelled
  else
    match status
    when Pending
      if event == "pay"
        Paid
      else
        status
      end
    when Paid
      if event == "ship"
        Shipped
      else
        status
      end
    when Shipped
      if event == "deliver"
        Delivered
      else
        status
      end
    when Delivered
      status
    when Cancelled
      status
    end
  end
end

fn label(status: OrderStatus) -> String
  match status
  when Pending
    "Pending"
  when Paid
    "Paid"
  when Shipped
    "Shipped"
  when Delivered
    "Delivered"
  when Cancelled
    "Cancelled"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut status = OrderStatus.Pending
  let events = ["pay", "ship", "unknown", "deliver"]
  mut i = 0
  while i < events.len()
    let event = match events.get(i)
    when Some(e)
      e
    when None
      ""
    end
    status = next(status, event)
    print(label(status))
    i = i + 1
  end
end
